tooltipRangeEnd: Select end turn and open manual summarize
notifyRangeStartRequired: Select a start turn with the right icon first
sessionTargetLorebookHint: Leave empty to pick a book when summarizing.
convApiConfigIdDesc: Leave empty to inherit global plugin settings, then the global default preset.
convTargetLorebookIdDesc: Summary entries are written here. Empty = pick when summarizing or on auto block. Not the same as inject lorebooks in Bindings.
convAutoSummarizeEnabledDesc: Schedules block-based auto summarize (preview still required).
convAutoSummarizeProgressNext: Next trigger: after turn {turn} is persisted
convAutoSummarizeProgressOff: Auto summarize is off; no scheduled runs
convAutoSummarizeResetHint: Updates scheduling pointers only; lorebook entries are not deleted. Enter the last turn you have actually summarized (0-based, inclusive).
convAutoSummarizeResetAheadWarn: Value exceeds max turn {max}; auto runs will wait for more turns.
convBlockTurnsDesc: Session override; clear to inherit global default.
convBufferTurnsDesc: Recent turns kept out of the current block; clear to inherit global default.
manualDialogBody: Pick plot summary and/or Sidecars; re-summarizing the same range is allowed.
manualDialogBodyPlotOnly: Summarize the selected turns as a plot entry; re-summarizing the same range is allowed.
manualTurnRangeHint: Keep the range within 512 turns (macro indexing window). Wider ranges cannot be submitted—narrow start/end.
notifyTurnRangeTooLong: Turn range exceeds 512 turns. Narrow the start/end and try again.
manualTasksHint: Runs serially: plot first, then selected Sidecars.
promptPreviewBody: Assembled for the current range and selected tasks (regex + macros). No model call.
reviewDialogBody: Edit title, body, and keywords before saving to the lorebook.
reviewDialogBodySidecar: Title is locked to the Sidecar name. Edit body and keywords; confirm to overwrite the lorebook entry.
notifyReviewReadyBody: Model output is ready. Open the chat to review and save to the lorebook.
notifyTaskSkippedGeneric: This step failed; skipped and continuing
enableDialogBody: Summarize the range below and enable auto blocks. Earlier turns: use manual summarize. Range is fixed; Sidecars are optional.
enableTasksHint: Plot summary is required. Selected Sidecars apply to future auto blocks in this chat.
notifyAutoSummarizeScheduled: Auto summarize will start at turn {turn}
notifyAutoSummarizeResumed: Resumed from last summary; next batch {from}–{to}, trigger around turn {turn}
pickLorebookDialogBody: No target lorebook is set. Pick one to save summaries (e.g. if the book was deleted).
recoverLorebookDialogBody: The target lorebook no longer exists. Pick another book or create one from the template; Sidecar entry mappings will be reset.
notifyTargetLorebookDeleted: Summary lorebook was deleted — pick or create one
notifyTargetLorebookMissingWarn: Target lorebook missing — select one before summarizing
autoSummarizeDefaultEnabledLabel: Enable auto summarize on new chats
autoSummarizeDefaultEnabledDesc: New conversations only. Schedules auto summarize after the first turn. Manual off persists for that chat.
sessionAutoSidecarsHint: Plot summary is always included; pick Sidecars to update on each auto block.
notifyNoApiConfig: No API preset configured for summarization
notifyParseFailedBody: Model output was invalid; this step was skipped.
notifyContextExceeded: About {used} tokens, exceeds budget {budget}. Shorten the range.
notifyContextLengthMissing: Configure context length on the API preset
notifyNoTasksSelected: Select at least one summarize task
notifyInvalidRange: Start turn cannot exceed end turn
apiConfigIdDesc: API preset for summarization; leave empty to inherit conversation plugin settings, global plugin settings, or the global default preset.
triggerEveryNTurnsDesc: Auto-summarize one block every N turns (after buffer). Independent from manual ranges.
bufferTurnsDesc: Recent turns excluded from auto blocks (still in chat history). Prefer ≤ global history injection turns.
targetLorebookModeDesc: Manual: pick an existing book when unset. Auto: create a lorebook from the template for this chat.
autoLorebookNameTemplateDesc: Template placeholders (not prompt macros): ${conversationTitle}, ${conversationId}, ${char} (first character card); appends conversation id on name clash.
bindLorebookConfirmBody: 「{name}」 is now the summary write target. Also bind it to this chat for prompt injection? (Existing lorebooks stay bound.)
previousSummariesLimitDesc: Attach the latest N plot summaries whose end turn is before this batch start. 0 disables.
regexRuleIdsDesc: Lists enabled rules that include the outgoing phase only. Applied in list order to dialogue in <history>; disk is not modified. Leave unchecked to skip.
regexApplyAllTurnsLabel: Ignore skip — apply to all turns
regexApplyAllTurnsDesc: When enabled, selected outgoing rules ignore each rule's skip-last-N setting; every user/assistant line in the summarize range is processed. When off, skip windows use each rule's setting and the conversation tail.
entrySortModeDesc: When enabled, reorders the target lorebook after each summarize batch finishes (plot + Sidecar): prefix entries → Sidecars → summaries by turn suffix.
defaultEntryTriggerModeDesc: Recommended order: semantic (vector) > keyword > always inject. Vector recalls relevant summaries by meaning; keyword needs trigger words; always inject runs every turn.
sidecarEnabledDesc: Auto runs patch fixed Sidecar entries after each plot block (overwrite, not append).
sidecarsDesc: Each item maps to one fixed lorebook entry. Removing a block does not delete the entry. Trigger mode and priority apply on the next summarize.
sidecarItemPromptDesc: System message for the summary model. Supports {{user}}, {{char}}, {{date}}, etc.
sidecarItemTriggerModeDesc: Constant inject recommended; changes apply on next summarize.
systemPromptTemplateDesc: Instruction template sent as the final system message. Earlier system messages hold read-only reference blocks (previous-summaries / sidecars); the user message is only <history>. Supports {{user}}, {{char}}, {{date}}, {{authorsNote}}, etc.
systemPromptTemplateDefault:
You are a skilled scene summarizer who captures plot and **in-story timelines** thoroughly. Earlier system messages may include read-only blocks: <previous-summaries>, <sidecars>; the user message is only the batch to summarize: <history>. Summarize **only** the role-play dialogue inside <history>. Reference blocks are for context only—do not copy them into the summary body.

Return valid JSON in exactly this shape:
{
  "title": "Short scene title (1-3 words)",
  "content": "Detailed chronological narrative prose…",
  "keywords": ["keyword1", "keyword2"]
}

For content:
- **Plot timeline is required**: If the dialogue states calendar dates, times of day, seasons, relative time (e.g. "three days later", "next morning"), or scene/time jumps, state them clearly at the **start** of the summary and stay consistent with <previous-summaries>.
- Then recount the scene in chronological order without losing important beats; omit [OOC] or meta chatter that does not serve the summary.
- This summary enters the lore library and vector retrieval—include key events, character beats, memorable lines, and consequences that affect later {{user}} / {{char}} interaction.
- Be thorough and readable; do not copy long verbatim passages.

For keywords: provide 15–30 concrete, searchable terms (places, objects, proper nouns, distinctive actions, timeline cues). Avoid vague themes (e.g. "sadness", "love"); avoid bare character names unless part of a place/event/object name.

For title: a short scene label only; the system appends turn suffix when writing to the lorebook—do not add numeric ranges yourself.

Return JSON only—no other text.
sidecarSystemPromptTemplateDefault:
You are a dialogue state tracker. Read-only reference blocks appear in earlier system messages; the user message is only <history>. Update relationships, goals, and key state for the current scene from <history>, using prior sidecar state in system when helpful.

Return JSON with only title, content, keywords (string array; include searchable keywords).
slashPlotDescription: Historian: open manual summarize. e.g. /plot, /plot summary 99-150, /plot sidecar name 99-150 (name is case-sensitive)
slashErrUnknownType: Unknown subcommand. Use: /plot, /plot summary [N-M], /plot sidecar name or quoted name [N-M]
slashErrUnquotedSpaces: Names with spaces must be double-quoted, e.g. /plot sidecar "My Lore" 99-150
slashErrInvalidRange: Invalid turn range; use N-M (turnOrdinal, 0-based inclusive)
slashErrEntryNotFound: No sidecar entry named "{name}" (names are case-sensitive)
slashErrEntryAmbiguous: Multiple sidecar entries named "{name}"; rename to unique names
slashErrOpenManualFailed: Could not open the manual summarize dialog
